description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical barrel with a flat top and bottom, featuring a smooth, matte surface in a dark gray color. The sides are vertically faceted, giving it a polygonal appearance rather than being perfectly round. There are two small, protruding side handles, one on each side, which are subtle and blend into the body of the barrel. The handles appear to be short and stubby, likely made from the same material as the main body. The barrel has no visible lid or cover, and there are no external markings, labels, or decorative features. Its robust and utilitarian design suggests it is intended for practical use in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, dark gray cylindrical barrel with a matte, faceted surface and two small side handles. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible lid or markings.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from an angle showing a small side handle protruding on the right side.
description_view_1: Both small side handles are visible, one on each side, making this the clearest view of the handles.
description_view_2: A single small handle is visible on the left side, with the rest of the barrel's surface plain.
description_view_3: No handles or features are visible; only the smooth, faceted cylindrical surface is seen.
